t_ch: 很高兴见到你，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}。逻辑：重逢来得比推测中更早些。
t_en: It's good to see you, {F#madam}{M#sir}. Affirmation: This reunion has happened earlier than my calculations predicted.

t_ch: 虽然没有邀请你——但欢迎，{NICKNAME}，记住这历史性的一刻。三位天才共处一室，这事有多久没发生了？下一次又得多久以后？
t_en: Though you weren't invited, I welcome you to remember this historical moment, {NICKNAME}. How long has it been since three geniuses were in the same room together? And how long will we have to wait for it to happen again?

t_ch: 肯定：除模拟宇宙外，我们少有彼此交流的契机。我很期待这次碰撞会带来怎样的思想火花。
t_en: Affirmative. Discounting our discussions on the Simulated Universe, our interactions are scarce. I look forward to the innovative ideas that may emerge from this juxtaposition of minds.

t_ch: （热情地欢呼！）
t_en: (Cheer passionately)

t_ch: （礼貌地鞠躬。）
t_en: (Bow politely)

t_ch: 那我就开门见山了——我认为是时候为模拟宇宙再找一位合作伙伴了。
t_en: Let me get straight to the point. I think it's time to find another partner for the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: …你要把斯蒂芬踢出局？
t_en: ...You wish to kick Stephen out?

t_ch: 不，怎么会？斯蒂芬不想掺和这事，投了弃权票——行吧，我尊重每个人的生活方式，但他没机会参与这场决策了。
t_en: No, of course not! Stephen doesn't want to get involved and voted to abstain — whatever. Look, I respect the way people want to live, but he doesn't have the chance to be involved in this decision-making anymore.

t_ch: 提问：为模拟宇宙引入第五位合作者？
t_en: Question: Are we introducing a fifth partner for the Simulated Universe?

t_ch: 对，第五位天才。
t_en: Yes. A fifth genius.

t_ch: 我们聚在这里的理由，各位心里都清楚。除了「答案」，还有什么能把天才俱乐部的家伙召集在一起？
t_en: The reason for our gathering is clear to everyone present. What else could prompt such a gathering of brilliant minds except for the "answer"?

t_ch: 没人能拒绝星神的秘密，赞达尔也做不到。会有人回应我们的。
t_en: No one can refuse the secret of the Aeons, not even Zandar. We'll definitely get a response.

t_ch: 如果来的人是波尔卡•卡卡目呢？
t_en: What if the responder is Polka Kakamond?

t_ch: 那不是正好？「寂静领主」——你在听吗？我是#83黑塔，我想见你。我们一定会有很多共同话题！
t_en: That'd be great! Hey, Lord of Silence, are you listening? I'm member #83, Herta, and I want to meet you. I believe you and I will have a lot to talk about.

t_ch: 波尔卡•卡卡目应该不会回应。她失去音讯很久了。
t_en: It's unlikely we'll hear from Polka Kakamond. She's been off the grid for quite some time.

t_ch: 概率：#64原始博士可能会出现。
t_en: Probability: Member #64, Dr. Primitive, may appear.

t_ch: 哦，那不行。且不论原始博士那堆劣迹斑斑的研究，他和巡海游侠的恩怨肯定会被公司大做文章。别了，我可不想模拟宇宙沾上奇奇怪怪的舆论。
t_en: That's a hard pass. Given Dr. Primitive's shady research practices and his tussle with the Galaxy Rangers, the IPC will surely turn this into a media circus... he can get lost. I'd prefer it if the Simulated Universe remained scandal-free.

t_ch: 余清涂呢？阮•梅，你和她还有往来吗——她还活着吗？
t_en: What about Yu Qingtu? Are you still in touch with her, Ruan Mei? Is she still alive?

t_ch: …如果要谈论这个话题，可以让{F#她}{M#他}先离席吗？因为过程会很漫长…且无趣，不必占用别人的时间。
t_en: ...Can we ask {F#her}{M#him} to leave if we are to discuss this topic? The process will be long... and boring. There's no need to take up other people's time.

t_ch: 哦，当然可以，{F#她}{M#他}本来就是你带进来的。你决定就好。
t_en: Of course. You brought {F#her}{M#him} in, after all. It's up to you.

t_ch: 来，我送送你吧。
t_en: Alright, let me walk you out.

t_ch: 对了，这是什么鬼？
t_en: Aaaand what the heck is this?

t_ch: 看起来像是程序错误。
t_en: Seems like a programming error.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这个阮•梅的「切片」，你在模拟宇宙里见过吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, this fragment of Ruan Mei — have you seen it in the Simulated Universe before?

t_ch: 见过。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 模拟宇宙就是我的家！
t_en: The Simulated Universe is my home!

t_ch: （我又开始说胡话了……）
t_en: (I'm speaking nonsense again...)

t_ch: 没见过。
t_en: No.

t_ch: 应该是个偶然产生的错误事件。
t_en: It's probably an isolated glitch.

t_ch: 行吧，无所谓，我习惯睁一只眼闭一只眼，省事。只是有点好奇，阮•梅，你会继续留着它吗？
t_en: Fine, I'm used to turning a blind eye to these things — it makes life easier. I am curious though... are you gonna keep it, Ruan Mei?

t_ch: 会吧，根据记录，{NICKNAME}挺喜欢这个事件。
t_en: I probably will. Records indicate {NICKNAME} likes this Occurrence.

t_ch: 行，我同意。只要对研究有益，你想做什么都无妨。
t_en: Alright, I agree. As long as it helps you with your research, you can do whatever you want.

t_ch: 幸好只是虚惊一场。不过会议是我最头疼的事物…看样子很难脱身，得在这里待上一段时间了。
t_en: Thankfully, it was just a minor scare. Still, meetings give me such a headache... It seems I'll have to stay put for a while.

t_ch: 我见你回收了主控舱段的生命体，非常感谢。你做得很好。
t_en: I see that you've recovered the lifeform in the master control zone. Thank you, well done.

t_ch: 结果我一句话都没说。
t_en: I didn't end up saying anything.

t_ch: 是我谨小慎微了，习惯使然，抱歉。
t_en: I was simply being overly cautious. It is a habit of mine. Apologies.

t_ch: 有什么不能让我听的？
t_en: Is there something I shouldn't hear?

t_ch: 没有，你误会了。我只是觉得黑塔开会的这段时间，你能更方便地出入空间站。
t_en: No. You misunderstand. While Herta is tied up in meetings, you might find it more convenient to roam the space station.

t_ch: 有些事我得早点告诉你，等会议结束…或许就来不及了。
t_en: There are some things that I must tell you now. If I wait for the meeting to finish... then it might be too late.

t_ch: 我的生命体回收…还没完成，它们不止一个。还有一些，被存放在某个封闭的舱段。
t_en: The retrieval of my lifeforms isn't complete yet. There's more than just one, and some are stored in a sealed zone.

t_ch: 黑塔用那里接待各路银河来客，或是天才俱乐部会员。但受军团入侵影响，它不再对外开放了。
t_en: Herta uses that place to welcome visitors from across the stars, or to welcome members of the Genius Society. However, due to the Legion's invasion, it is no longer open to the public.

t_ch: 如今，那里存放着我的「大麻烦」。
t_en: And now my "headache" is stored there.

t_ch: 空间站还有别的舱段？
t_en: There are other zones in the space station?

t_ch: 嗯，空间站的秘密远比你想的更多，黑塔也是。
t_en: There's much you don't know about the space station, and even more about Herta.

t_ch: 一些信息倒是可以透露：那里也会用来接待非人形的访客，有连通外空的接驳车。
t_en: But there is some information I can give you. That place is also used to welcome non-humanoid visitors and has a shuttle that connects to outer space.

t_ch: 黑塔授权你使用的？
t_en: So Herta gave you permission to use this place?

t_ch: 她给了我权限，没有再过问。
t_en: She gave me permission and said no more.

t_ch: 我把自己的指令卡给你。把手给我，我为你将指纹录入其中。
t_en: I'm giving you my access card. Give me your hand, and I'll input your fingerprint into it.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，注意安全。如果你遇见实在解决不了的危险，就给个信号，我会不顾影响，亲自出面。
t_en: Stay vigilant, {NICKNAME}. Should you come across a threat you can't handle, just alert me. I'll come to your aid, no matter what.

t_ch: 记住，在舱段中央，有一个巨大的…培养皿。那里存放着我的「大麻烦」。
t_en: Remember, there is a giant... incubator... in the middle of the zone. That's where my "headache" is stored.

t_ch: 等你回来后，就来月台找我。那时你会明白一切。
t_en: Once you're back, come find me on the railway platform. Then you'll understand everything.

t_ch: 空间站的空气令人舒适。结论：知识在其中流淌。
t_en: The air in the space station has a pleasant quality. Affirmation: Knowledge flows within it.

t_ch: 会有第五位天才加入吗？
t_en: Will there be a fifth genius joining?

t_ch: 我期待另一种思想的加入。我将等待尊贵的来客，予以对方最高的礼节，相信知性的火光将在摩擦中迸发。
t_en: We anticipate the inclusion of a different perspective. I await our esteemed guest and shall offer the highest courtesies — I'm confident that our discussions will generate illuminating insights.

t_ch: 想了解#64原始博士。
t_en: I want to know about member #64, Dr. Primitive.

t_ch: 我并不知晓他的真名。原始博士曾犯下诸多反人类罪行，因此有人猜测他并非有机生命。逻辑：无机生命与有机生命都应崇尚和平。
t_en: Dr. Primitive's true identity is not known to me. His previous transgressions against humanity lead some to conclude he may be an inorganic entity. Affirmation: All beings, organic or otherwise, should value peace.

t_ch: 你还会在空间站停留多久？
t_en: How long will you be staying on the space station?

t_ch: 我将再驻足一段时间。艾丝妲小姐近日表现出对空间站一些骚乱的担忧，结论：我将观察片刻。
t_en: I will stay for a while longer. Lady Asta has recently expressed concerns regarding disturbances on the space station. Conclusion: Extended observation is necessary.

t_ch: 监控器良好运行着，监控着阳光房的植物培育状态。
t_en: The monitor is running smoothly, keeping an eye on the growth of the plants in the Sunroom.

t_ch: （用来监控阮•梅培育的生物生长情况…？）
t_en: (Used to monitor the growth of Ruan Mei's creations...?)
(Meow...)

t_ch: （…这就是阮•梅口中的大麻烦？）
t_en: (...This is the "headache" Ruan Mei mentioned?)

t_ch: （只是换了一种口味嘛……）
t_en: (It's just a different flavor...)
(Meow...)

t_ch: 它称自己是豆沙灰灰味的。
t_en: It refers to itself as "Gray Bean Paste"

t_ch: 你是躲在糕点里了吗？
t_en: Are you hiding in the dessert?
(Meow...)

t_ch: 它称自己与外壳是一体的。
t_en: It claims to be connected with its shell.

t_ch: 你还挺吓人的！
t_en: You're pretty scary!
(Meow...)

t_ch: 它看起来十分忧愁，泪水倾泻而出。
t_en: It looks deeply distressed, crying profusely.

t_ch: 激活特殊的联觉信标。
t_en: Activate the Synesthesia Beacon.

t_ch: 呜呜…呜呜……
t_en: *sob*... *sob*

t_ch: （我不是…阮•梅认可的作品…呜呜…）
t_en: (I'm not one of Ruan Mei's recognized works... *sob*...)

t_ch: （负能量太多…不喜欢负能量，呜呜……）
t_en: (Too much negative energy... don't like negative energy, *sob*...)

t_ch: 你也有自己的天才之处！
t_en: You are a genius in your own way!

t_ch: （呜呜…阮•梅…呜呜…）
t_en: (*sob*... Ruan Mei... *sob*)

t_ch: 它似乎觉得自己的情绪感染力也十分天才。
t_en: It seems to believe that its emotional infectiousness is also quite genius.

t_ch: 人人都有负能量的时候。
t_en: Everyone feels down once in a while.

t_ch: （呜呜…阮•梅…呜呜…）
t_en: (*sob*... Ruan Mei... *sob*)

t_ch: 它似乎非常歉疚，它的眼里闪烁着一丝不甘，似乎想要得到阮•梅的认可。
t_en: It seems deeply remorseful, and there's a glint of resentment in its eyes, as if it yearns for Ruan Mei's acknowledgment.

t_ch: 呜呜…呜呜……
t_en: *sob*... *sob*

t_ch: （为什么…我…是…失败的？）
t_en: (Why...? Why am I... a failure?)

t_ch: #23阿茶在机械城中的最后岁月给予了我启发，如她那般长寿的生命也会走到尽头。
t_en: The final days that Genius Society member #23, Acha, spent in the Mechanical City showed me that even the longest of lives, such as hers, have a limit.

t_ch: 现在我可以确定，本次培育结果为：不合格。
t_en: I'm now certain that the outcome of this cultivation is: Failure.

t_ch: 生命的形式成千上万，也因此证明形式本身并无意义。
t_en: Life can exist in thousands of different forms, which means the form itself has no purpose.

t_ch: 这些生命在各自的概念上走得十分遥远，甚至能引发通感的连锁反应…但这并不是我想要的。
t_en: These lifeforms are very advanced in their own concepts, and can even trigger chain reactions such as synesthesia... but that is not what I desire.

t_ch: 我开始迷茫了。「生命的本质」这一提问，是否原本就没有答案？#1赞达尔，你也曾这样迷茫…且绝望过吗？
t_en: I am starting to feel lost. Perhaps the question "what is the essence of life" never had an answer? Member #1, Zandar, have you ever felt this lost... or resigned?

t_ch: 生命五光十色，我坚信如此。它的绚丽如乱花迷眼，而我要从中采撷永不枯萎的那一枝。
t_en: Life is countless and varied in form. I firmly believe in that. Its beauty is like a myriad of flowers, and I want to pluck the one that never wilts.

t_ch: 事物的规律总是外表庞杂动人，内在却简单质朴。万物归因，一行公式可解众生迷茫。
t_en: The patterns of all things always have complicated and enchanting exteriors, while their inner essences remain simple and plain. If we were to trace things back to their roots, just one equation would be enough to solve the confusion of all life.

t_ch: 自懂事起，我就乐于观察微观生物的生命痕迹，譬如黏菌吞噬物体的速率；我也将宏观的世界尽收眼底，研习宇宙至今的发展进程——都很简单。
t_en: Ever since I was a child, I have always delighted in observing aspects of microscopic creatures... such as the speed with which slime molds devour objects. I have also gazed far and wide across the macroscopic world, investigating the progress of the universe up to this day — it was all very simple.

t_ch: 我要弄清的是「生命的本质」，每一个体都拥有，却不自知的事物——无论是存在的物质性，还是超出物质之外的不可知物。
t_en: I wish to discover "the true essence of life," something that all individuals possess unknowingly, whether it is the materialism of their existence or an unknown entity beyond corporeal realms.

t_ch: 为避免对科学产生盲从，我谨慎提出质疑——阮•梅能否如坐标轴般剥去外界纷扰，探明生命最本源、也最美丽的存在形式？
t_en: To avoid blind faith in science, I cautiously raised a query... Would Ruan Mei be able to peel away external influences? Just like pinpointing a coordinate, would she be able to uncover life's most primordial and beautiful form of existence...?

t_ch: 我想到有一种「生命形式」，足以令我承认其不可捉摸。那就是……
t_en: I thought of one "lifeform" that would truly lie beyond my reach, and that is...

t_ch: （什么东西打开了？）
t_en: (Did something just open?)

t_ch: 隐藏房间，嘶嘶。仅「阮•梅」女士可使用。请出示凭证，嘶嘶。
t_en: Hidden room, *buzz*. Only Madam Ruan Mei has permissions. Please submit your ID, *buzz*.

t_ch: 出示阮•梅的指令卡。
t_en: Show Ruan Mei's card.

t_ch: 鉴定通过，嘶嘶。
t_en: Permission granted, *buzz*.

t_ch: 选择以下服务：一，历史培育记录查询。二，无机生命陪伴谈话服务。
t_en: Select from the below services: 1. Check historical incubation records. 2. Inorganic lifeform companionship chat service.

t_ch: 无机生命陪伴谈话服务。
t_en: Inorganic lifeform companionship chat service.

t_ch: 该功能已损坏，嘶嘶。
t_en: This function has been damaged, *buzz*.

t_ch: 历史培育记录查询。
t_en: Check historical incubation records.
(Is this...?)

t_ch: 我想到有一种「生命形式」，足以令我承认其不可捉摸。
t_en: I thought of one lifeform that would truly lie beyond my reach.

t_ch: 那就是…「令使」。
t_en: And that is... an Emanator.

t_ch: 令使为何物，我不得甚解。
t_en: I cannot comprehend what an Emanator is.

t_ch: 学者将其视作星神力量的代行。那么，是从何时开始，又是在哪一点上，它变得比其他生命都更接近「星神」？
t_en: Scholars view them as the executors of the Aeons' power. So, when did it begin, and at what point did they become closer to the "Aeons" than any other lifeform?

t_ch: 起初，我试图培育一位天才。但我失败了，此题尚不可解，还有漫长的路要探索。
t_en: At first, I tried to create a genius. I failed. That question has no solution yet, and a long journey of discovery still lies ahead.

t_ch: 但宇宙间的命途并非只有「智识」一条，如果抛却理性，在其他路径上是否存在更原始、也更纯粹的「令使」？
t_en: However, Erudition isn't the only Path in the Universe. If we set logic aside, would there be more primitive and pure "Emanators" on other Paths?

t_ch: ——当然存在。
t_en: Of course there would be.

t_ch: 塔伊兹育罗斯，通过模拟宇宙，我得以窥见寰宇蝗灾的始末，攫取虫皇及其子嗣的数据，复制、培育，从而开辟全新的研究分支。
t_en: Tayzzyronth. I was able to see the beginning and end of The Swarm Disaster through the Simulated Universe, obtain data on the Imperator Insectorum and their descendants, replicate them, nurture them, and create a brand-new scientific discipline.

t_ch: 很合理的判断，我一定会成功。由我还原出的「它」将绽放前所未有的生命。
t_en: It is a logical decision. I will certainly succeed. The entity that I reconstruct will bloom into a life never before seen.

t_ch: 黑塔和螺丝咕姆会喜欢这个实验吗？应该不会。所以在他们察觉前……
t_en: Will Herta and Screwllum like this experiment? Most likely not. Therefore, before they realize what I am doing...

t_ch: …我得加快动作，并寻找一位合适的「助手」。
t_en: ...I must hurry my work, as well as find a fitting "assistant."

t_ch: 鉴定通过，嘶嘶。
t_en: Permission granted, *buzz*.

t_ch: 选择以下服务：一，访客记录查询。二，「培养皿」入口开启。
t_en: Select from the below services: 1. Check visitor records. 2. Open incubator entrance.

t_ch: 访客记录查询。
t_en: Check visitor records.

t_ch: 阮•梅女士，嘶嘶。
t_en: Madam Ruan Mei *buzz*.

t_ch: 异界物种，嘶嘶。
t_en: Alien species, *buzz*.

t_ch: 石膏头男人，嘶嘶。
t_en: Man with plaster head, *buzz*.

t_ch: （……好像比之前多了什么？）
t_en: (...Seems like there's something new?)

t_ch: 「培养皿」入口开启。
t_en: Open incubator entrance.

t_ch: 权限开启，嘶嘶。
t_en: Permission granted, *buzz*.

t_ch: （是楼上传来的声音！）
t_en: (That sound's coming from above!)

t_ch: 天才们的会议结束了，关于模拟宇宙的未来…结论并不重要，重要的是你那边。
t_en: The meeting of geniuses is over. As for the future of the Simulated Universe... That conclusion isn't important. What's important is your task.

t_ch: 看样子…你生气了，对吧？对不起，我没什么可辩解的。时至今日，我的实验失败了无数次，结局也总在预料之内。
t_en: You look... upset, correct? I regret my actions. There's no defending what I've done. Time and again, my experiments have fallen short, and they've always yielded predictable results.

t_ch: 我创造了一个「复制体」，但它和那位令使的距离…终究遥不可及。
t_en: I made a clone, but it... doesn't hold a candle to the Emanator.

t_ch: 它自我湮灭了。
t_en: It died on its own.

t_ch: 嗯，和计算结果一致：<unbreak>56</unbreak>秒，分毫不差。
t_en: Exactly as predicted: <unbreak>56</unbreak> seconds, on the dot.

t_ch: 你可以不用瞒着我。
t_en: You didn't have to lie to me.

t_ch: 我该怎么向你解释呢？我不擅长与人交流……
t_en: How should I have explained it to you? I'm not good at communicating with others...

t_ch: 受困于时间和场地，它的生命编组只能算半成品。我复现出它诞育的瞬间，但很快，它就会化作粒子消散。
t_en: Restrained by time and place, its code of life could only be considered an incomplete attempt. I managed to replicate the moment it was born, however, it would soon disappear and be reduced to particles.

t_ch: 和所有的生命形式一样，在走向终点的过程中逐渐迎来结局——我并不排斥这点。
t_en: Like every living being, it inevitably faced its demise as it journeyed towards the end — I find no fault in that.

t_ch: 但短暂的一生也应有意义。我想知道它能做到些什么，这代表了我在未理解的领域中走出了多远。
t_en: However, even the briefest life should have meaning. I want to know the limits of its capacity. It will indicate how far I've gone in a field completely incomprehensible to me.

t_ch: 「微不足道的一步」——和预想中一样的答案。
t_en: Haha, and it was "a minuscule step" — just as I had predicted.

t_ch: 它差点吃了我。
t_en: It almost ate me.

t_ch: 我说过，如果你遇见难以逾越的危险，我会出手将其击落。
t_en: I did say that if a danger proved too great for you, I would personally step in to confront it.

t_ch: 你还要继续研究？
t_en: Are you going to keep researching?

t_ch: 是，我以此屏蔽嘈杂的噪音。不得不承认，研究曾令我过分痴迷——那不是段很好的时间。但现在，我更加得心应手了。
t_en: Indeed, this is how I keep the distractions at bay. I have to admit that research once made me obsessive — that wasn't a good period in my life, though I now navigate it much more smoothly.

t_ch: 除研究外的生活呢？
t_en: What about life outside of research?

t_ch: 我没有除研究以外的生活。人们总认为这样的代价超乎想象，但对于我，它似乎可以接受。
t_en: I do not have a life outside of research. People always think this price is unimaginable, but it seems rather acceptable to me.

t_ch: 事实上，我并不喜欢一切总如我规划的那样进行，没有变数的实验是乏味的。
t_en: I must admit, I'm not fond of scenarios where everything aligns perfectly with my expectations. An experiment should have its unforeseen twists.

t_ch: 也因此，我很高兴。在这个几乎都是「如期到来」的故事中，还是有着「意外之喜」。
t_en: That's where the joy lies. Even the most predictable storylines can have their pleasant surprises.

t_ch: 不用将答案告诉我，我只是…有感而发。该如何照顾它们？留在空间站或许是最好的选择。
t_en: There is no need to tell me your answer. I just... felt like asking the question. How should I take care of them? Perhaps leaving them at the space station is the best choice.

t_ch: 我这样很不负责吧，抱歉。对于自己的造物，我常常不知如何面对。
t_en: Do I seem irresponsible? I'm sorry. I am often at a loss as to how to face my own creations.

t_ch: 「反吐真剂」的药效也将过去。日后若有人提起我，你随意便是，或者说不曾相识也好。
t_en: The effects of the Anti-Truth Serum will also wear off. If others mention me to you in the future, you can answer however you like, or even pretend you never knew me.

t_ch: 反正，我们之间的记忆很快也会如烟雾一样消散。
t_en: After all, your memory of me will soon dissipate like smoke.

t_ch: 记忆…消散？
t_en: Memory... dissipate?

t_ch: 世上没有不透风的墙，因一些不愿提起的往事，我很难信任自己之外的人。
t_en: Over time, hidden truths tend to surface. Past traumas, which I'd rather leave behind, have made me skeptical about trusting anyone but myself.

t_ch: 如果不希望秘密泄露，最彻底的方法就是将其销毁。「反吐真剂」的尾调会让你忘记我们共同经历的这一小段时光。
t_en: If I do not want a secret revealed, the most foolproof way is to destroy it. The Anti-Truth Serum will make you forget the brief period we spent together.

t_ch: 它不会立即生效，而是一个缓慢、朦胧的过程——就像荷叶、梅花、糯米，还有糖霜的清香。
t_en: It won't take effect immediately. It is a slow, intangible process — like the sweet fragrance of lotus leaves, plum blossom, sticky rice, and frosting sugar.

t_ch: 你或许会想起有人在空间站做了任性的实验，但不会再记得是谁。也许有一天我们又重新相遇，但你不会再把我与这件事联系在一起。
t_en: Perhaps you will remember someone performed selfish experiments on the space station, but you will no longer remember their identity. Perhaps we will meet again someday, but you won't be able to connect me with the recollection.

t_ch: 这样，生命与生命之间的牵绊就会被抹去。友情、秘密、纠葛、欺骗，都会一同烟消云散。
t_en: That way, the connection between lifeforms will be erased. Friendships, secrets, grudges, lies, all will disappear.

t_ch: 这样会让我们…更加轻松。
t_en: It will make our lives... more relaxing.

t_ch: 如果你希望，我会的。
t_en: If that is your wish, I will forget you.

t_ch: 嗯，我知道。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 不，我不会忘记你的。
t_en: No, I won't forget you.

t_ch: 嗯，我相信。
t_en: I believe you.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆还会继续留在空间站一段时间，他和黑塔还有问题没有解决。我很快就要走了，但不会特意跟大家道别。
t_en: Screwllum will stay on the space station for a while longer. He and Herta still have problems they need to solve. As for me, I'm leaving soon and won't bother with goodbyes.

t_ch: 还记得我提过的「无人之地」吗？等研究告一段落，在间歇的休息时间，我打算再一个人去看看。
t_en: Do you still remember the "No Man's Land" I mentioned? I'm considering a solo trip back there during my research downtime, just to see how things are.

t_ch: 偶尔，我会想念#55余清涂，每逢告别，她总会给我调制一些好喝的饮品。
t_en: I miss member #55, Yu Qingtu sometimes. She used to always make something delicious for me to drink every time we parted ways.

t_ch: 希望不要遇到#4波尔卡•卡卡目，不然可能会很麻烦。
t_en: I hope I won't meet member #4 Polka Kakamond. That would be quite troublesome.

t_ch: 不知道下一次天才聚会是什么时候。{NICKNAME}，还有什么想对我说的吗？
t_en: Who knows when the next gathering of geniuses will be? Do you have anything else you want to say to me, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 现在你信任我了吗？
t_en: Do you trust me now?

t_ch: …我难以回答。感谢你，我的助手{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
t_en: ...I find that difficult to answer. I thank you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Assistant.

t_ch: 希望你回去看看造物们吧。
t_en: I hope you'll come back and visit your creations.

t_ch: 嗯，我答应你，我的助手{M#先生}{F#小姐}。
t_en: Mm, I promise I will, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Assistant.

t_ch: 如果有机会，如果你愿意——等再次相识后，我们可以一同去「无人之地」，航行于平静的冰川上。
t_en: If fate allows and you're interested, upon our next meeting, we could journey to No Man's Land and traverse its tranquil glaciers...

t_ch: 但那样的话，它对我们二人就都不是「无人之地」了。真是一道难题啊。
t_en: ...though I suppose it wouldn't be No Man's Land anymore... What a conundrum.

t_ch: （阮•梅…熟悉又陌生的名字……）
t_en: (Ruan Mei... a name that's both new... and familiar.)

t_ch: （月台边有个人，莫非她就是……）
t_en: (There's someone next to the railway platform. Could she be...?)

t_ch: 人流散去后，这里就会变得十分宁静呢，就像我曾经去过的「无人之地」。
t_en: As the masses depart, there's an enveloping calm here, just like in the "No Man's Land" I've ventured to in the past.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…你能想象一个没有生命的世界吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Can you imagine a completely lifeless world?

t_ch: 在那里，一眼可以望见地平线尽头的恒星。
t_en: From there, you can glimpse the stars that lie at the very edge of the horizon.

t_ch: 巨大的蓝绿色恒星沿着星轨运行，万丈光芒下，只有白茫茫的天地。
t_en: Following its celestial trajectory, the great teal star illuminates an endless sea of white across both the sky and land.

t_ch: 我和母亲在平静的冰川上航行，在世界中寻找生命的痕迹，邂逅各种奇异的现象。
t_en: My mother and I navigated calm glaciers looking for signs of life on that world... and encountered many bizarre phenomena.

t_ch: 就像在拼图堆成的小山中寻找唯一正确的那片，过程千奇百怪，无比艰辛，却又令人感动，令人着迷。
t_en: It was like finding the single correct piece in a mountain of jigsaw pieces. The process was convoluted and unimaginably difficult, but it was touching and enthralling as well.

t_ch: 此后每次遇见同样的风景，我都忍不住驻足停留。
t_en: From then on, whenever I come across a familiar scene, I find myself pausing to take it all in.

t_ch: （好多人…看来就是这儿了）
t_en: (There are so many people... this seems to be the place)

t_ch: 呃…这家伙……
t_en: Um... so this...

t_ch: 就是阮•梅培育的「小生命」？
t_en: ...is the "little lifeform" Ruan Mei made?

t_ch: 来吧，{NICKNAME}，我送你离开。
t_en: Come along, {NICKNAME}. I'll see you out.

t_ch: 看来是我多心了，黑塔只是一时兴起…很符合她的作风。
t_en: It appears I was overthinking things. Impulsive behavior is pretty characteristic of her after all.
(Meow...)

t_ch: 它似乎在提醒你路上有着可能的威胁……
t_en: It seems to be warning you of potential threats ahead...
(Meow...)

t_ch: （它似乎怕你害怕，为你哼起了歌…）
t_en: (It seems to sense your fear and starts humming a song for you...)

t_ch: （阮•梅造物们手拉手，大家围成一圈。）
t_en: (In a circle, Ruan Mei's creations join hands with each other.)

t_ch: （阮•梅把开心与悲伤，全部搓成一团。）
t_en: (Ruan Mei intertwines joy and sorrow.)

t_ch: （阮•梅、阮•梅，为什么不回头看看我们？ ）
t_en: (Ruan Mei, Ruan Mei, why do you not turn back to look at us?)

t_ch: （阮•梅、阮•梅，你前进的路通往何方？ ）
t_en: (Ruan Mei, Ruan Mei, where does your path lead?)

t_ch: （那里没有…我们的身影吗？）
t_en: (...Is there no place for us, where you're going?)

t_ch: （竟然有这么一大群……）
t_en: (I never imagined there'd be so many of them...)

t_ch: （你也在这儿？看来这里就是单向通道的另一头。）
t_en: (You're here too? Seems like this is the other end of that one-way path.)
(Meow...)

t_ch: （你在示意我去更前方吗？）
t_en: (Are you telling me to keep going?)
(Meow...)

t_ch: （好像有什么东西打开了？）
t_en: (Did something just open?)

t_ch: （是楼上传来的声音！）
t_en: (That sound's coming from above!)

t_ch: （咦？远处似乎有个人…是谁？）
t_en: (Huh? There's someone in the distance... who is that?)

t_ch: （好大的房间…空间站还有这么开阔的地方？）
t_en: (This is huge... The space station has an area this big?)

t_ch: （一位「繁育」令使的复制体？！怎么可能…）
t_en: (An Emanator of Propagation clone!? How can that be...?)

t_ch: （空间站会被它毁掉的…！）
t_en: (It'll destroy the space station...!)

t_ch: （这算结束了吗…必须得回去找阮•梅问个明白！）
t_en: (Is it over...? I need to get some answers out of Ruan Mei!)
(Meow...)

t_ch: 阅读标识记录。
t_en: Read the record

t_ch: 日照时间的长短是影响情绪的重要因素，多晒星光被证明是有效缓解负面情绪的方法。
t_en: The duration of sunlight exposure is a crucial factor affecting mood. Basking in starlight has been proven to be an effective method to alleviate negative emotions.

t_ch: （听起来很适合它……）
t_en: (Sounds fitting...)

t_ch: 安置豆沙灰灰。
t_en: Accommodate Gray Bean Paste

t_ch: 在这里待一会儿吧。
t_en: Stay here for a bit.

t_ch: 我必须承认，在过程中诞生的这些小家伙，它们有时令人动容。
t_en: I have to admit that these little ones born in the process... sometimes move me.

t_ch: 在它们身上，我看到一种类人反应，是与神性截然相反的概念——它们具有感情。
t_en: I see a human-like response in them. It is a concept completely opposite to that of divinity — they have emotions.

t_ch: 感情的表征可能是积极，也可能是消极。但其中，植根心底的爱是永恒不变的东西。
t_en: Emotions may be either positive or negative. However, the love rooted in the depths of their heart is eternal and unchanging.

t_ch: 它们离天才尚有距离，因而无法分辨这种爱是友情？爱情？还是亲情？
t_en: They are still a long way from becoming geniuses and are therefore unable to discern whether this love is one of friendship, romance, or familial love.

t_ch: 可天才就能将其分辨吗？至少我做不到…我不理解「爱」为何物，也无从回应它们的感情。
t_en: That being said, can even geniuses tell the difference? I cannot, at least... I do not understand what "love" is and cannot respond to their feelings.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，在你眼里，我做错了吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, do you believe my actions were wrong?

t_ch: 愣着做什么，你时间很多吗？我看不像。坐电梯下去，你要找的东西就在那里。
t_en: Are you waiting for a sign? Time is ticking. Descend via the elevator — what you seek is there.

t_ch: 你是谁？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: 你为什么在这里？
t_en: Why are you here?

t_ch: 你知道我在找什么？
t_en: You know what I'm looking for?

t_ch: 提问之前，不如先想一想，答案是否对你要解决的问题有益。
t_en: Have you considered whether the answer to your question will be of any relevance to our current predicament?

t_ch: 如果没有，最好别问，显然你我的时间都很宝贵。
t_en: If a question is of no help, then don't ask it. Time is clearly precious to the both of us.

t_ch: …算了，就当做个示范：我知道你是谁，也知道你在为阮•梅办事；我本是空间站的访客，误入此地，目睹了她的实验。
t_en: *sigh* ...Never mind. Allow me to clarify something. I know exactly who you are, and I'm aware you are in Ruan Mei's employ. This was not my intended destination — I just happened to find my way here during my visit and saw what she was up to.

t_ch: 我的目的大抵和你相同，既然你来了，我便不会干涉；可如果你失败，我就会强硬介入，阻止一些不必要的麻烦。
t_en: My goals are roughly aligned with yours. Since you're here, I won't intercede... but should you fail, I will be forced to prevent some avoidable misfortunes.

t_ch: 你知道这些就够了——一共两句话，非常高效的沟通。
t_en: That's all you need to know. Just two paragraphs. Very effective communication.

t_ch: 你人还挺好的噢。
t_en: You're not a bad person after all.

t_ch: 因为我讨厌不知礼数，恶语相向的人——当然，也包括我自己。
t_en: I can't stand discourtesy — even when it comes from myself.

t_ch: 你为什么戴着石膏头…
t_en: Why do you wear an alabaster head...

t_ch: 因为我见不得蠢材，当然，他们也不想见我。
t_en: Because I can't bear to see idiots. Of course, they wouldn't want to see me either.

t_ch: 谢谢你告诉我这些。
t_en: Thank you for telling me that.

t_ch: 因为我讨厌不知礼数，恶语相向的人——当然，也包括我自己。
t_en: I can't stand discourtesy — even when it comes from myself.

t_ch: 真正的「阮•梅造物」就藏在下方的巨型培养皿中。
t_en: The real "Ruan Mei's Creation" is hidden in the giant incubator below us.

t_ch: 走吧。顺着这趟电梯，敬请见证——「天才的杰作」。
t_en: Go. Take the elevator and bear witness to this "Genius' Masterpiece."

t_ch: 哼哼，你不知道吧，芝士流心和豆沙灰灰，后来联合起阮•梅培育的各种生物，给她写了一封信！
t_en: Hmm, did you know that Molten Cheese Tart and Gray Bean Paste later teamed up with various creatures cultivated by Ruan Mei, and wrote her a letter!

t_ch: 就叫做「走在自己的道路上吧，阮•梅！我们永远支持你！」
t_en: Let's call it "Walking Your Own Path, Ruan Mei! We'll always support you!"

t_ch: （被封闭的舱段…会是什么样子？）
t_en: (What would a sealed zone... look like?)
*buzz*

t_ch: （这家伙是怎么回事？看起来和主控舱段的不一样…）
t_en: (What's up with this unit? It looks different from the one in the master control zone...)

t_ch: 嘶嘶，黑塔女士，开启舱段。嘶嘶，用以接待，异界物种，银河访客。
t_en: *buzz* Madam Herta, open zone. *buzz* To welcome, alien species, galactic visitors.

t_ch: 高危警戒区域，嘶嘶。服务人员，无机生命，嘶嘶。
t_en: High-risk zone, *buzz*. Service staff, inorganic lifeforms, *buzz*.

t_ch: 已授权给：「阮•梅」女士。黑塔女士：都行，她开心就好。嘶嘶。
t_en: Permissions status: Madam Ruan Mei, permissions granted. Madam Herta: Fine. As long as it keeps her happy. *buzz*.

t_ch: 你为什么在这里？
t_en: Why are you here?

t_ch: 嘶嘶，是小炒饭机器人的双生机器，炒冷饭机器人。嘶嘶。
t_en: *buzz* I am a twin of the Rice-Frying Robot. I am the Leftover Rice-Frying Robot. *buzz*

t_ch: 维持舱段运转。无机生命的工作。嘶嘶。
t_en: Maintain zone operation. Job of inorganic lifeforms. *buzz*

t_ch: 这个舱段是干嘛的？
t_en: What is this zone for?

t_ch: 一级保密区域，嘶嘶。
t_en: Class one clearance zone. *buzz*

t_ch: 各类贵宾。嘶嘶。可能有危险人士，嘶嘶。
t_en: Many esteemed guests. *buzz*. May include dangerous persons. *buzz*

t_ch: 黑塔女士的危险奇物收容。嘶嘶。
t_en: Storage for Madam Herta's dangerous Curios. *buzz*

t_ch: 阮•梅女士的生命培育。嘶嘶。
t_en: Madam Ruan Mei's cultivated lifeforms. *buzz*

t_ch: 接待，嘶嘶，{NICKNAME}。请问需要查询什么？
t_en: Welcome, *buzz* {NICKNAME}. How can I help?

t_ch: 机器人工作分工。
t_en: Classification of the robots' jobs.

t_ch: 炒冷饭，嘶嘶。
t_en: Fry leftover rice. *buzz*

t_ch: 炒热饭，嘶嘶。
t_en: Fry leftover rice. *buzz*

t_ch: 地图。
t_en: Map.

t_ch: 地下一层，中转中枢，嘶嘶。
t_en: Basement One. Transit Hub. *buzz*

t_ch: 地下二层，接驳车，培养皿，危险奇物收容，嘶嘶。
t_en: Basement Two. Shuttle. Incubator. Dangerous Curio storage. *buzz*

t_ch: 走廊，危险，嘶嘶。
t_en: Corridor, danger, *buzz*.

t_ch: 接待，嘶嘶，{NICKNAME}。请问有何需求？
t_en: Welcome, {NICKNAME}. What do you need? *buzz*.

t_ch: 我该去哪里找「培养皿」？
t_en: Where would I find the incubator?

t_ch: 结论：无法进入。嘶嘶。概率：<unbreak>50%</unbreak>。仍有路径可以查询。
t_en: Conclusion: You cannot enter. *buzz* Probability: <unbreak>50%</unbreak>. Other paths are open.

t_ch: 判断：寻路需求，嘶嘶。
t_en: Assessment: Seeking directions. *buzz*

t_ch: 建议：前往地下，寻找培育路径记录，嘶嘶。
t_en: Suggestion: Proceed to basement. Locate records of cultivation path. *buzz*

t_ch: 我想查询访客记录。
t_en: I want to see visitor logs.

t_ch: 阮•梅女士，嘶嘶。
t_en: Madam Ruan Mei *buzz*.

t_ch: 异界物种，嘶嘶。
t_en: Alien species, *buzz*.

t_ch: 其余暂无。
t_en: That is all.

t_ch: 怎么了，还不走？
t_en: What's wrong? You're not leaving?

t_ch: 会有第五位天才加入吗？
t_en: Will there be a fifth genius joining?

t_ch: 看看是什么家伙咯。
t_en: Depends on who they are.

t_ch: 想了解#4 波尔卡•卡卡目。
t_en: I want to know about member #4, Polka Kakamond.

t_ch: 女人。她脖子上的丝巾挺时髦，我对她很感兴趣。
t_en: Female. Wears a fashionable scarf. I find her rather fascinating.

t_ch: 你审视着阮•梅造物，它似乎仍在悲伤地等待阮•梅来接它。
t_en: You gaze at Ruan Mei's creation, which appears to still be waiting sadly for Ruan Mei to come get it.

t_ch: 你有一丝心软。
t_en: A hint of compassion tugs at your heart.

t_ch: 什么声音？
t_en: What's that noise?
(Meow...)

t_ch: 跟着我吧，没事的。
t_en: Follow me. It'll be okay.

t_ch: （得找个地方安置这小家伙…刚才的声音似乎就在附近，是从锁住的房间传来的，怎么进去呢？）
t_en: (I need to find a place for this little one... That sound seems to be from that locked room. How do I get in?)

t_ch: （…咦，门外有动静？）
t_en: (...Huh? What's that sound out there?)

t_ch: 好漂亮的星空……
t_en: What a beautiful starry sky...

t_ch: 终于到站了！
t_en: At long last!

t_ch: 好热闹啊……
t_en: So lively...

t_ch: 听说最近有大人物要来。
t_en: I heard that a big shot is coming soon.

t_ch: 走，快去吃饭，饿死了。
t_en: Come on, time to eat, I'm starving.

t_ch: 这就是空间站！
t_en: So this is the space station!

t_ch: 听说黑塔女士……
t_en: I heard that Madam Herta...

t_ch: 呃，什么是天才俱乐部？
t_en: Huh, what Genius Society?

t_ch: 听说阮•梅研究时……
t_en: I heard that when Ruan Mei is researching...

t_ch: 阮•梅的口味……
t_en: Ruan Mei's preferences...

t_ch: 黑塔女士完全不管她……
t_en: Madam Herta doesn't care about her at all...

t_ch: 相位灵火的火种很有趣，可惜研究还未完成，它就消失不见了；我开启了新的尝试。
t_en: The kindling for the Phase Flame is fascinating. Unfortunately, before the research could be completed, it vanished. I've initiated new attempts.

t_ch: 这次的两个样本生长状态良好。我在「概念」中加入了个人的口味喜好，我不确定这么做的结果。
t_en: The growth status of the two samples this time is promising. I incorporated personal taste preferences into the concept, but, I'm uncertain of the outcome of such an action.

t_ch: 它们同时拥有两种情绪体征：可爱、软弱、敏感、爱哭；凶悍、教唆、霸道、自信。
t_en: They simultaneously possess two sets of emotional traits. They are at once cute, weak, sentimental, and sensitive... yet are also fierce, instigating, demanding, and confident.

t_ch: 有趣的是，它们也拥有一种倾向；思念自己的造物主，对其产生如同天然存在的，婴儿对母亲、生命对食物、人与人的、奇怪的「情感」。
t_en: Interestingly, they also possess a kind of inclination — a yearning for their creator. It manifests as a natural, inherent emotion — similar to that of a baby towards its mother... Life towards sustenance, or the peculiar bond between humans.

t_ch: 黑塔把我和螺丝咕姆叫来空间站，为了商议些重要的议题。她还给斯蒂芬发了邀请，但他没回信，黑塔似乎不想再等了。
t_en: Herta called Screwllum and I to the space station to discuss some important topics. She also sent an invite to Stephen, but he didn't reply and Herta didn't seem to want to wait any longer.

t_ch: 接下来…我希望你陪我一同出席。
t_en: And now... I wish for you to attend this meeting with me.

t_ch: 好吧…
t_en: Alright...

t_ch: 嗯，我们走吧。
t_en: Alright, let's go.

t_ch: 我再想想…
t_en: Let me think...

t_ch: 好啊，不着急。
t_en: Alright. There's no rush.

t_ch: 「阮•梅」造物蹦到了桌子上！
t_en: Ruan Mei's creation jumps onto the table!

t_ch: （芝士流心和豆沙灰灰，联合起阮•梅培育的各种生物给她写的一封信。）
t_en: (Molten Cheese Tart and Gray Bean Paste teamed up with various creatures nurtured by Ruan Mei and wrote her a letter.)

t_ch: （翻译：走在自己的道路上吧，阮•梅！我们永远支持你！）
t_en: (Translation: "Walk your own path, Ruan Mei! We'll always support you!")

t_ch: 阮•梅怎么还没来？
t_en: Why hasn't Ruan Mei come?

t_ch: 它居然发出了我的声音！
t_en: It actually made my voice!

t_ch: 好可怕……
t_en: Scary...

t_ch: 奇怪的声音……
t_en: What strange sounds...

t_ch: 培养皿残渣已清扫……处理中……
t_en: Growth container fragments have been cleaned up... Processing...

t_ch: 正在清扫中……请稍候。
t_en: Cleaning in progress... Please wait.

t_ch: 本区域清扫完毕，等待执行下个队列的清扫计划。
t_en: This area has been cleaned. Waiting to execute the next cleaning plan in line.

t_ch: 来得正好，我们刚打开「空间站特产」。
t_en: Perfect timing, we just opened the "space station souvenirs."

t_ch: 空间站特产在哪儿？
t_en: Where are the space station souvenirs?

t_ch: 这台小机器人就是他们的「特产」。
t_en: This little robot is one of their "souvenirs."

t_ch: 他们和公司联合研发，虽然技术上还不算最尖端，但市场反响很好，给空间站带来不少创收。
t_en: They developed it alongside the IPC. Although it's not exactly cutting-edge technology, they've gotten a great market response and brought the space station a lot of revenue.

t_ch: 这玩意我见得多了。
t_en: I've seen so many of these things.

t_ch: 嗯，艾丝妲批量采购了好几个批次，空间站里一直沿用到现在。
t_en: Yeah, Asta bought loads of them in bulk. They still use them on the space station to this day.

t_ch: 这台机器人是最新版，搭载了空间站研发的智能系统，能自主工作，感觉和人工智能助手没什么区别。
t_en: This one is the newest model equipped with an intelligence system they developed on the space station. It can work autonomously and it feels no different to an AI assistant.

t_ch: 唔，那位维修工程师还是太热心了，因为星穹列车给他帮了些小忙，他便坚持要抱着小机器人一路走到月台，还要亲自送到列车上……
t_en: I still think that engineer went overboard. Just because the Astral Express helped them out with some stuff before, he insisted on bringing that little robot all the way to the railway platform and delivering it to the Express personally.

t_ch: 帮忙？什么忙？
t_en: Help? With what?

t_ch: 之前到访空间站的时候，在某些舱段遇到小机器人失灵，我和丹恒就顺手调试了下。
t_en: When we went to the space station before, there were a few little robots that had crashed in various zones. Dan Heng and I went and debugged them as we were passing through.

t_ch: 还有小三月，她帮应物科测试了下多维扫描仪。
t_en: March also helped the Department of Implement Arts test their multidimensional scanner.

t_ch: 这人听起来好耳熟…
t_en: Why does that name sound familiar...

t_ch: 怎么，没有印象了吗？
t_en: What, do you not remember them?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我可是听那位工程师说，之前是你帮他修好了机器人，他一直跟我们夸你呢。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I heard that engineer say that it was you that helped them with the robot repairs before. He was always telling us great things about you.

t_ch: 虽然我们在空间站的确帮过不少忙，但那都是小事，反倒是科员们太客气了。
t_en: We may have helped the space station with a few things in the past, but they were just little jobs. I really think the researchers are being too kind.

t_ch: 这些琐事也占不了我们太多时间，而星穹列车和黑塔空间站一直保持着良好的关系，能帮的还是尽量帮一下。
t_en: These trivial things really don't take up too much of our time. Plus, the Astral Express and the Herta Space Station have always maintained a good relationship. It makes sense that we help them as much as we can.

t_ch: 你们都这么有空吗？
t_en: You all have that much time on your hands?

t_ch: 你们不嫌麻烦吗？
t_en: Do you not find it irritating?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，那你觉得，开拓者应该做什么呢？
t_en: Well, what do you think a Trailblazer should do then, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 开拓者拯救世界！
t_en: Trailblazers save the world!

t_ch: 探索新世界比较重要。
t_en: Exploring new worlds is more important.

t_ch: 原来{NICKNAME}是这样想的啊…但在我看来，旅途很长，可我们并不是每天都在忙着做什么惊天动地的大事。绝大部分时间，我们都在处理各种琐事。
t_en: I didn't realize you felt that way, {NICKNAME}... If you ask me, our journeys are long, and it's not like we're dealing with earth-shattering events every single day. We spend most of our time dealing with trivial matters like this.

t_ch: 可正是这些看似微不足道的小事，构成了真正的开拓之旅。
t_en: But, it is precisely these kinds of small, menial tasks that form a trailblazing expedition.

t_ch: 我不理解…
t_en: I don't understand...

t_ch: 琐事就交给其他人干吧。
t_en: Can't we just get someone else in to do the menial jobs?

t_ch: 我明白了…原来你是这样想的。这样吧…不如我们做个小实验？
t_en: I see... So that's what you think. How about this... Why don't we do a little experiment?

t_ch: 从你登上星穹列车后第一次到访的世界开始，去看看那些接受过星穹列车帮助的人现在过得如何，说不定会有意想不到的发现。
t_en: Why don't you go and see how the people who received help from the Astral Express are doing now, starting with the first world you visited after boarding the Express? I think you might discover something quite unexpected.

t_ch: 姬子在小机器人的顶部轻轻按了一下，激活了小机器人。
t_en: Himeko lightly tapped the top of the little robot to activate it.

t_ch: 检测到新访客。正在扫描…扫描成功！
t_en: New visitor detected. Scanning... Scanning complete!

t_ch: 已载入列车轨迹数据，导航服务已开启。
t_en: Express trail data downloaded successfully, navigation system engaged.

t_ch: 输入的数据比较少，它还需要接收大量的外部训练。带上它吧，跟着你一起，它会越来越智能。
t_en: There hasn't been much data uploaded to it, it will still need a massive amount of external training. Take it with you, and it will gradually grow smarter as you travel.

t_ch: 已确认出行目标，抵达目的地时，将自动记录使用者的信息。
t_en: Destination confirmed. User information will be recorded on arrival at the target location.

t_ch: 我这算是被你们流放了吗？
t_en: Does this mean you're exiling me?

t_ch: 怎么会这么想？要说流放的话，我们可是把列车组最小的成员从帕姆手上挖过来送你了。
t_en: Why would you think that? If anyone is being exiled, we've taken the Express Crew's tiniest member, wrenched them from Pom-Pom's arms and gifted them to you.

t_ch: 与其说是「流放」，不如当做我请你帮个忙吧？
t_en: I think it's better to take this as me asking you for a favor than considering it "exile?"

t_ch: 其实我是想让你带着小机器人出去，做一些实地训练，这样用起来才能更贴合你的习惯。
t_en: I actually wanted you to take this little robot along with you to do some field training. This way, it will become more suited to your habits.

t_ch: 这就走？会不会太急了？
t_en: So I just go now? Is this not a bit sudden?

t_ch: 等你准备好了再出发。你可以先熟悉一下这位「小助手」。
t_en: You can take some time to prepare before you head off. Why not get used to working with your "trusty assistant" first?

t_ch: 已设置为自适应模式，待机中……
t_en: Adaptive mode activated. Standing by...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，不用着急，每到一个地方，重要的是用心去观察与感受——看看那些对我们而言微不足道的「小事」，究竟在人们心中留下了什么。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, there's no need to fret. Just pay attention to what you feel in your heart in each area you go to — go and see just how those "trivial jobs" we did for people affected them.

t_ch: 已将目的地添加至待办事项，用户可随时启动导航程序。
t_en: Destination has been added to to-do list. The user can activate the navigation protocol at any time.

t_ch: 好吧，我抽空去看看。
t_en: Alright, I'll go and check it out when I get time.

t_ch: 行，我这就出发。
t_en: Okay, I'll go now then.

t_ch: 要是遇到什么困难，可以随时回来找我们。
t_en: If you run into any trouble, you can come back and find us any time.

t_ch: 当然，你要是实在不感兴趣，也可以将这件事暂且搁置，回头我再问问小三月他们。
t_en: Of course, if you really aren't interested at all, you can put this matter aside for now. I can always ask March and the others another time.

t_ch: 要是遇到什么困难，可以随时回来找我们。
t_en: If you run into any trouble, you can come back and find us any time.

t_ch: 其实我是想让你带着小机器人出去，做一些实地训练，这样用起来才能更贴合你的习惯。
t_en: I actually wanted you to take this little robot along with you to do some field training. This way, it will become more suited to your habits.

t_ch: 系统已激活，用户身份已确认。
t_en: System activated. User identity confirmed.

t_ch: 正在载入日程数据…载入中…载入完成。
t_en: Loading itinerary data... Loading... Loading complete.

t_ch: 接下来去哪儿？
t_en: Where am I going now?

t_ch: 开下导航我看看。
t_en: Let's take a look at the navigation system.

t_ch: 已完成星穹列车航线数据的同步。已锁定第一个目标地点：贝洛伯格-行政区-中央广场。
t_en: Synchronization with Astral Express navigation data complete. Locked on to first target destination: Belobog Administrative District — Central Plaza.

t_ch: 正在调取最近联系人数据…调取中…调取成功。
t_en: Retrieving recent contact data... Retrieving... Data retrieval complete.

t_ch: 当前目标人物为「华劳斯」。
t_en: Current target: "Wallace."

t_ch: 哦，我跟他很熟。
t_en: Oh, I know Wallace very well.

t_ch: 已更新用户数据，导航关闭，请自行联络。
t_en: User data updated. Navigation disabled. Please make contact with the target personally.

t_ch: 他人在哪儿？
t_en: Where is he?

t_ch: 根据历史记录，当前区域无危险因素。无需开启远程通讯模式，请在附近区域内搜索目标人物行踪。
t_en: According to historical records, there are no threats to be found in the current domain. Remote communication mode is not required. Please locate the target's whereabouts within the current domain.

t_ch: 雷金先生，我虽然还是没听懂您的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论，但我的直觉告诉我，这是一项震古烁今的发现。
t_en: Mr. Regin, though I still do not fully understand your "big universe time tunnel" theory, my intuition tells me that this is an era-defining discovery!

t_ch: 没关系，华劳斯，你能感受到这项理论的伟大，就已经胜过全宇宙<unbreak>99.99%</unbreak>的人了。来，我再用更加通俗易懂的方式给你解释一遍……
t_en: Fear not, Wallace. The very fact that you are able to sense the greatness of my theory already places you above <unbreak>99.99%</unbreak> of people in the universe. Come, I will find an even simpler way to explain it to you...

t_ch: 华劳斯，别被雷金骗了。
t_en: Wallace, don't fall for Regin's tricks.

t_ch: 谁？！谁在污蔑我？
t_en: Who said that!? Are you slandering my name?

t_ch: 不是，哥们你俩在干什么？
t_en: Of course not. What are you two doing?

t_ch: 干什么？当然是传播科学啊。
t_en: What am I doing? Spreading scientific theory, of course!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，好久不见，你来得正好。请允许我隆重的向你介绍我的挚友，伟大的科学家，宇宙真理道路上的探索者——雷金先生。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, it's been a while. You came at just the right time! Please allow me to introduce my dear friend, great scientist, and explorer on the path of universal truth — Mr. Regin.

t_ch: 我和{NICKNAME}是老熟人了，之前{F#她}{M#他}多次帮我向教育部递交过论文，虽然一次也没成功。
t_en: {NICKNAME} and I go way back. {F#She}{M#He} has helped me submit my papers to the Ministry of Education many times. Although, none of them were ever successful...

t_ch: 不过也多亏{F#她}{M#他}把事办砸，我才决定自己创立科学期刊，才有机会结识华劳斯。
t_en: Although, it is thanks to {F#her}{M#his} screw-ups that I finally decided to make my own scientific publication. Without that, I would never have had the chance to meet Wallace.

t_ch: 你俩居然能成为朋友？
t_en: I didn't expect you two to be friends?

t_ch: 纠正下，不是朋友，是挚友。
t_en: I'll stop you there. We are not just friends, we are best friends.

t_ch: 没错，没有比华劳斯更懂我的人了。
t_en: That's right, no one knows me better than Wallace.

t_ch: 恭喜啊，你俩都圆梦了。
t_en: Congratulations, you have both fulfilled your dreams.

t_ch: 谢谢，认识雷金先生之后，我曾经空虚的生活变得充实了，每天都能学习到很多新知识。
t_en: Thank you. My boring life has become so fulfilling since I met Mr. Regin. I get to learn all sorts of new things every day.

t_ch: 填充你生活的不是我，是科学。
t_en: It was not me that made your life fulfilling. It was science.

t_ch: 这也许就是书本里说的，两个孤独且高尚的灵魂最终会走到一起。
t_en: Perhaps this is what authors mean when they speak of lonely but noble souls finding their way to be together.

t_ch: 更值得庆幸的是，我们的友谊还产生出了结晶——《民间科学》。作为贝洛伯格第一部私人创办的科学期刊，我很荣幸成为它的赞助人。
t_en: What's even more worth celebrating is that our friendship has also produced something great — Citizen Science. As the first privately owned scientific journal in Belobog, I am honored to become one of its sponsors.

t_ch: 华劳斯，我永远不会忘记你的雪中送炭，我一定会把期刊办成，让我俩的名字共同镌刻在贝洛伯格的科学史上！
t_en: Wallace, I will never forget how you came to save me in my moment of need. I assure you that I will finish this journal and have our names etched in the history of Belobog together!

t_ch: 也许我来的不是时候。
t_en: Perhaps I came at the wrong time.

t_ch: 不，你来的正是时候。
t_en: No, your timing is actually perfect.

t_ch: 你俩日子过好比什么都重要。
t_en: I'm just glad you're both doing well.

t_ch: 谢谢，也希望你能找到自己挚友。对了，我还有最后一件事情需要你的帮助。
t_en: Thank you. I also hope that you are able to find your own best friend. Oh, that's right — there was one more thing that I wanted to ask for your help with.

t_ch: 我记得你的摄影技术十分高超，请帮我和雷金拍一张合照吧，作为我们友谊的见证。
t_en: I remember your photography skills are top-rate. Could you please take a picture of me and Regin together as a symbol of our friendship?

t_ch: 伟大的科学组合确实需要一张供后人纪念的合照。
t_en: You're right. A great scientific team will require a photo to serve as a memento for future generations.

t_ch: 我记得你的摄影技术十分高超，请帮我和雷金拍一张合照吧，作为我们友谊的见证。
t_en: I remember your photography skills are top-rate. Could you please take a picture of me and Regin together as a symbol of our friendship?

t_ch: 伟大的科学组合确实需要一张供后人纪念的合照。
t_en: You're right. A great scientific team will require a photo to serve as a memento for future generations.

t_ch: 拍完了？让我看看……
t_en: Done? Let's have a look...

t_ch: …唔，背景、构图、光线、姿势和表情，都无可挑剔，正如我和雷金先生完美的友谊。
t_en: ...Wow. The background, the composition, the lighting, the poses, the expressions... I would not change a thing, just like my perfect friendship with Mr. Regin.

t_ch: 就拿这张照片做下一期《民间科学》的封面吧。
t_en: We'll use this picture as the cover of the next issue of Citizen Science.

t_ch: 待办事项1已完成，接下来将导航至——「歌德宾馆」，该地区的联系人是「老歌德」，已规划最优路线。
t_en: To-do list item 1 is complete. Next, navigate to Goethe Hotel. The contact for this area is Old Goethe. The optimal route has already been plotted.

t_ch: 老歌德，今天谁想摸鱼了？
t_en: Old Goethe, who's looking to slack off today?

t_ch: 哈哈，现在哪还有委托给你接啊。你要是再晚来几天，「正当权益会社」都要解散了。
t_en: Haha, you think I still have assignments for you at this age? If you were here a few days later, I think "The Rightful Rights Society" would have already been disbanded.

t_ch: 这么好的社团还能解散？
t_en: How could such a great society disband?

t_ch: 如今不比从前，大家对工作和生活的态度改变了。
t_en: Things are different now. People's attitudes towards work and life have changed.

t_ch: 不可能，摸鱼是人的本性。
t_en: No way. Slacking off is human nature.

t_ch: 那是从前，现在的人可拼了。
t_en: That was before. People are going all out nowadays.

t_ch: 自从贝洛伯格与外界取得联系以后，人们的心态好像都受到了影响，加班的人变多了，走在路上的脚步变快了，连来我这喝下午茶的客人都少了。
t_en: Ever since Belobog made contact with the outside world, everyone's attitude seems to have been affected. More people are working overtime and everyone rushes from place to place. I've even got less people coming in for afternoon tea.

t_ch: 可能他们看到了拥有更好生活的可能，都想努力一点吧。
t_en: Maybe they all saw the possibility of getting a better life and decided to work harder.

t_ch: 唉…奋斗固然是好的，但怎么说呢，总感觉少了一些从前的松弛感。
t_en: Ah... It's always good to push yourself, but... How do I put it? I feel like we've lost that relaxing vibe we had before.

t_ch: 主张适当放松的「正当权益会社」自然就没落了，会员纷纷退社，现在只有我这个老头子守着告示板喽。
t_en: Naturally, "The Rightful Rights Society" that advocates for suitable relaxation has declined. Members are quitting one by one, and now I'm left here with the notifications board all alone.

t_ch: 完了，卷起来喽。
t_en: It's all over. The rat race now begins.

t_ch: 我要是年轻二十岁，说不定也会奋斗一番。
t_en: If I were <unbreak>20</unbreak> years younger, maybe I'd want to give it a go myself.

t_ch: 一定是公司文化入侵。
t_en: Sounds like an invasion of IPC culture.

t_ch: 那做公司的职工真辛苦啊。
t_en: Being an IPC employee must be really tough then.

t_ch: 诶…我突然想起来，昨天有个叫塞琳的姑娘来发布了委托，说是希望有人去花店买束花给她。
t_en: Oh... Come to think of it, there was a girl named Celine who posted an assignment yesterday! She wanted someone to go to the florist and buy her a bouquet of flowers.

t_ch: 可她连买什么花都没说清楚，只说是送给一位年轻美丽的著名女演员。
t_en: But she didn't even state what kind of flowers she wanted. All she said was that they were for a famous and beautiful actress.

t_ch: 那些花在我眼里全长一个样，实在不知道怎么选，这委托就一直搁置着。你愿意帮帮她么？
t_en: Flowers all look the same to me. I'd have no idea how to pick a bouquet, so I put her assignment aside. Would you be willing to help her?

t_ch: 我正好要去找她。
t_en: I was actually just on my way to see her.

t_ch: 那再好不过了。唉，这应该是会社的最后一单委托了。
t_en: Then that could not be more perfect. Ah, I imagine this will be the Society's last ever assignment.

t_ch: 其实我也不会选花。
t_en: I actually don't know much about flowers either.

t_ch: 总比我这个老头子强吧，唉，这应该是会社的最后一单委托了。
t_en: You can't be worse than an old crone like me. Ah, I imagine that this will be the Society's last ever assignment.

t_ch: 花店离这不远，买好以后直接去找那个姑娘吧，别让人家等着急了。
t_en: The florist isn't far from here. Go and find that girl as soon as you've got the flowers. Don't keep her waiting.

t_ch: 花店离这不远，买好以后直接去找那个姑娘吧，别让人家等着急了。
t_en: The florist isn't far from here. Go and find that girl as soon as you've got the flowers. Don't keep her waiting.

t_ch: 老爸快看，这是之前帮助过我们的{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Dad, look! It's {NICKNAME} who helped us before!

t_ch: 还真是，没想到会在花店遇到你，你也是来买花的吧？
t_en: So it is! I never expected to bump into you in the florist's! You're here buying flowers, too?

t_ch: 想挑束花送人。
t_en: I need to pick a bouquet for someone.

t_ch: 我也一样，这里的花比军需物资种类还多，我都挑昏头了。
t_en: Me too. There are more varieties of flowers here than I've seen military supplies! Trying to decide is making my head spin.

t_ch: 我在帮别人忙。
t_en: I'm helping someone out.

t_ch: 你还是那么乐于助人啊。
t_en: I see you're as helpful as ever.

t_ch: 我一直记得你对我们家的帮助，要不是你，我现在可没福气陪女儿逛街。
t_en: I will never forget how you helped my family. I wouldn't be here shopping with my daughter right now if it weren't for you.

t_ch: 你这是退役了？
t_en: Have you retired now?

t_ch: 还没呢，那些新兵蛋子太不让人省心了，我还得带他们一阵子。
t_en: Not yet. These recruits are a real handful. I have to lead them for a little longer.

t_ch: 你老婆没和你们一起？
t_en: Your wife isn't with you?

t_ch: 嗐，她一个人在家生闷气呢。
t_en: Hah, she's sulking at home alone.

t_ch: 我刚攒了几天休假，就想着赶紧回家看看老婆孩子。
t_en: I hurried home to see my wife and daughter as soon as I accumulated a few days of leave.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，笨老爸回来得匆匆忙忙，都忘了给家里带礼物。妈妈虽然嘴上没说什么，但脸上有点情绪，我赶忙拉着老爸出来买花弥补。
t_en: Hehe, silly Dad. He was in such a rush that he forgot to bring presents. Mummy said it was no problem, but her face told a different story, so I dragged Dad straight here to buy flowers to make up for it.

t_ch: 怪我怪我，回家路上太激动了，把礼物的事都忘了。
t_en: It's all my fault. I got so excited while on the way home that I completely forgot to bring a gift.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你的花选好了么？我们来帮你结账吧，算是表达一下谢意。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have you picked your bouquet? Let us buy it for you as a little token of our gratitude.

t_ch: 我有选择困难症。
t_en: I can't decide!

t_ch: 感觉每种都很好看。
t_en: They all look amazing.

t_ch: 这样啊，那您把诉求跟我说下，比如送什么样的人，我来给您出出点子。
t_en: I see. Why don't you tell me more about what you're looking for? Tell me who they're for and I'll come up with some suggestions.

t_ch: 送给一位著名女演员。
t_en: They're for a famous actress.

t_ch: 那我推荐您买上一束「侯爵夫人」——这是贝洛伯格最美丽、也是最难培育的一种花。
t_en: Then I would recommend a bouquet of "Marquise." They are the most beautiful flowers in Belobog, as well as the species most difficult to grow.

t_ch: 只有这种花，才能配得上著名女演员这种尊贵的身份。
t_en: Only a flower like that would be suitable for a distinguished actress.

t_ch: 就来一束「侯爵夫人」吧。
t_en: I'll take a bouquet of "Marquise" then.

t_ch: 好咧！我这就帮您挑上几株……
t_en: Alright! Let me help you pick a few...

t_ch: 送给一位年轻美丽的女士。
t_en: The flowers will be given to a beautiful young lady.

t_ch: 那我推荐您买上一束「七彩虹」——这种小花色彩斑斓艳丽，女士们都很喜欢呢。
t_en: Then I would recommend a bouquet of "Rainbow." This small flower is colorful and bright — ladies all love them!

t_ch: 就来一束「七彩虹」吧。
t_en: Then I'll take a bouquet of "Rainbow."

t_ch: 好咧！我这就帮您挑上几株……
t_en: Alright! Let me help you pick a few...

t_ch: 您的花包好啦，时候不早了，我们也要回家了。
t_en: Your flowers are all wrapped up. It's getting late. I should head home.

t_ch: 这花真漂亮啊，希望你送的人能够喜欢。
t_en: These flowers are beautiful. I hope the person you are giving them to likes them.

t_ch: 您的花包好啦，时候不早了，我们也要回家了。
t_en: Your flowers are all wrapped up. It's getting late. I should head home.

t_ch: 这花真漂亮啊，希望你送的人能够喜欢。
t_en: These flowers are beautiful. I hope the person you are giving them to likes them.

t_ch: 咦，你又来听小女子唱歌啊，这可不行啊，你得去歌剧院里正儿八经地听…难道说你还有什么事情要找小女子吗？
t_en: Huh. Are you here for my singing again? That won't do. You need to enjoy the proper performance in the theater... Or are you here for something else?

t_ch: 你要的花我拿来了。
t_en: I brought the flowers you asked for.

t_ch: 没想到居然是你接了委托，这束花真美，谢谢啦。
t_en: I never thought it would be you taking on the assignment. These flowers are beautiful. Thank you.

t_ch: 你为什么不自己去买？
t_en: Why didn't you go and buy them yourself?

t_ch: 我还担心你不喜欢。
t_en: I was worried you wouldn't like them.

t_ch: 你的眼光不会错的。
t_en: I trust your tastes.

t_ch: 其实本来我想自己去买的，毕竟是送给一位重要的朋友。但最近的演出实在太多了，我每天都忙着排练，根本抽不出时间。
t_en: I wanted to go and buy them myself. They're for a dear friend, after all. But I've had so many performances lately that I've been too busy with rehearsals to do anything else.

t_ch: 对了，我的朋友马上就来了，而且你也认识她，要不要一起见见？
t_en: Actually, my friend will be here in a second. You know her as well. So, do you want to catch up with her as well?

t_ch: 反正闲着也是闲着。
t_en: I've got nothing to do anyway.

t_ch: 你勾起了我的好奇心。
t_en: You've piqued my curiosity.

t_ch: 你和塞琳稍加等候，一个熟悉的身影出现了。
t_en: As you and Celine wait, a familiar figure soon appears.

t_ch: 你好啊塞琳！呀，{NICKNAME}也在啊。
t_en: Hello, Celine! Ah, you're here too, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 好久不见了塔米拉，试唱还顺利吧，我可是连庆功的鲜花都买好了。
t_en: Long time no see, Tamila. Your audition went well, I assume? I even bought you some flowers to celebrate!

t_ch: 好美的花！那我可就收下喽。
t_en: What beautiful flowers! Thank you so much.

t_ch: 至于试唱嘛，嘿嘿，比我想象得还要顺利。公司已经同意和我签约了，我很快就会以新人爵士歌手的身份出道。
t_en: As for the audition, hehe, it went even better than I imagined. The IPC has already agreed to sign me up! I am going to be debuting as a new jazz singer very soon.

t_ch: 什么公司…什么试唱。
t_en: The IPC...? An audition?

t_ch: 你不是演音乐剧的么？
t_en: I thought you did musicals?

t_ch: 塞琳没跟你说吗，我已经不当演员了。
t_en: Did Celine not tell you? I'm not an actress anymore.

t_ch: 起因是我参加了一场贝洛伯格与星际和平公司的文化交流活动，在那里接触了爵士音乐，从此就爱上了这种音乐形式。
t_en: It all started when I took part in a Belobog and IPC cultural exchange event, where I discovered jazz music. I fell in love with the genre immediately.

t_ch: 我的嗓音…你也是知道的，不适合唱音乐剧，但没想到竟然很适合唱爵士乐。
t_en: As you know... My voice is not well suited to musicals. Fortunately, it turns out that it's perfect for jazz!

t_ch: 我一直认为塔米拉小姐的嗓音很独特，是那种慵懒迷人的音质。现在你获得了登上更大舞台的机会，我真的为你感到高兴。
t_en: I always thought that you have such a unique voice, Miss Tamila. It has such a sultry and enchanting tone. Now that you've got a chance to step out on an even larger stage... I'm so happy for you.

t_ch: 塞琳，其实你也应该找到属于自己的舞台。
t_en: Celine, you should also go and find your own stage.

t_ch: 你的声音比我更适合音乐剧，形象和演技也很出色，完全可以走到舞台上，做一名真正的音乐剧演员。
t_en: Your voice is more suited to musicals than mine, and your appearance and acting skills are also remarkable. You could easily walk up to the stage and become a real musical performer.

t_ch: 可是…我，我真的可以吗？
t_en: But... Do you really think I can do that?

t_ch: 我很看好你。
t_en: I believe in you.

t_ch: 你都获得塔米拉认证了。
t_en: Even Tamila has given you her approval.

t_ch: 你当然可以！实话说，我马上就要去公司接受艺人培训，会离开贝洛伯格很长一段时间。
t_en: Of course you can! To be honest, I am about to go to the IPC to undergo training, and I will be away from Belobog for a long time.

t_ch: 歌剧院的舞台不能没有女主角，你是唯一有这个能力的人。所以，塞琳请答应我，不要让我们的演出谢幕。
t_en: The theater's stage will need a prima donna, and you are the only person who can do it. So, Celine, please promise me that you won't allow our performances to end here.

t_ch: 塔米拉小姐……
t_en: Miss Tamila...

t_ch: 其实成为音乐剧演员一直是我的梦想，既然塔米拉小姐和{NICKNAME}都这么相信我，那我会好好努力，不会让自己和你们失望的。
t_en: Becoming a musical performer has actually always been my dream. Miss Tamila, {NICKNAME}... As you both have so much faith in me, I will do everything I can to get there. I will not let you or myself down.

t_ch: 这样就对了嘛，你要争取成为剧场的台柱子啊。
t_en: That's more like it! You should aim to become the star of the entire theater!

t_ch: 我会去看你演出的。
t_en: I will come and watch your performance.

t_ch: 你…你等我适应舞台了再来。
t_en: Can... Can you come after I get a bit more used to the stage?

t_ch: 新的大明星即将诞生。
t_en: A new star is about to be born.

t_ch: 别这么说，塔米拉小姐才是大明星呢。
t_en: Don't say that. Miss Tamila is the real star here.

t_ch: 在离开贝洛伯格之前，总得留个纪念吧，不如我们仨拍张合照怎么样？下次再见面要很久以后了。
t_en: I have to leave behind a little memento before I leave Belobog. How about we take a picture together? All three of us? It will be a while before we are able to meet again.

t_ch: 那就以歌剧院为背景吧，这是我们艺术梦想起航的地方。
t_en: Then let's use the theater as the background. This is where our artistic dreams took off.

t_ch: 大家一起来到剧院门口。
t_en: All of you gather in front of the theater entrance.

t_ch: 请各位站好，我将在你们站定后开始拍照——
t_en: Please take your positions. I will take a picture as soon as you are all in place...

t_ch: 等下，我裙子有点皱，我稍微整理下。
t_en: Wait a moment. My skirt is a little wrinkled. Let me fix it quickly.

t_ch: 我也要补个唇蜜！
t_en: I want to put on some lip gloss, too!

t_ch: 好啦！
t_en: Alright!

t_ch: 我要开一下闪光灯，别眯眼！我开自动连拍了！
t_en: I will turn on the flash, try not to squint! Automatic burst mode activated!

t_ch: 来，笑一笑——
t_en: Alright, smile—

t_ch: 这可是我拍得最满意的一张。
t_en: That's the best photo I've taken all day.

t_ch: 拍得不错啊，以后我想家的时候就多看看这张照片。
t_en: Not bad! Now I can look at this picture whenever I miss home.

t_ch: 唉，经纪人在催了，我得出发了。等哪一天我发了个人专辑，第一时间寄给你们。
t_en: Ah, my agent is telling me I have to go. When I release my solo album, I'll send you a copy straight away!

t_ch: 呜呜…塔米拉小姐，有空的时候要回剧院看看啊。
t_en: Waaa... Miss Tamila! Make sure you come back to visit the theater when you have time!
